title: FinBERT - Financial Headline Sentiment Analysis
description: Classify sentiment of financial news headlines as positive, negative, or neutral, based on the FinBERT model (Araci, arXiv 2019). Annotators also rate market outlook on a bearish-to-bullish scale and provide reasoning for their sentiment judgment.
citation:
@article{araci2019finbert,
    title = "FinBERT: Financial Sentiment Analysis with Pre-Trained Language Models",
    author = "Araci, Dogu",
    journal = "arXiv preprint arXiv:1908.10063",
    year = "2019",
    url = "https://arxiv.org/abs/1908.10063"
}
